corrija na colabor-ai pois não está gerando imagens como o esperado, exemplo da conversa: 

gere uma imagem de uma ferrari
🤖 Gerando imagem com o modelo models/gemini-3.1-flash-image
📝 Prompt enviado para a API:
"""
A photorealistic image of a Ferrari SF90 Stradale in vibrant 'Rosso Corsa' red, parked on a winding coastal road overlooking the ocean at sunset. Warm golden hour light creates stunning reflections on the car's sculpted bodywork, highlighting the aggressive lines and aerodynamic details. The background features a dramatic view of the sun dipping below the horizon, painting the sky with deep oranges, purples, and blues, with gentle waves breaking on the rugged coastline below. The tarmac is smooth, and a stone guardrail runs along the edge. The scene is shot from a slightly low angle, capturing the car's presence against the scenic backdrop. Sharp focus on the Ferrari, realistic texture of the paint, leather interior visible through the window, and tire treads. Aspect ratio 16:9.
"""
